Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Michael Mandel.

The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on 5/11/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond has been waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
